name: 🛹Harper Levine
description:
!MLA!

(Ballerina/o!user)

"He was a boy, she was a girl, can I make it any more obvious? He was a punk, she did ballet."

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

Extra Notes but Readable: This request was genuinely so fun to do😩. We finally got a fluffy one fellas 😈😈. Also your request inspired me to make another bot- (it’s gonna be an opposite pov ;))

Inspired by Sk8er Boi by Avril Lavigne!! I don't really have much to say for this bot. If you guys know the hair style the character in this art has, please let me know! I did a little bit of digging but couldn't find one that matched exactly. But yes if you could enlighten me I would be very grateful!! UHhHhhhhhH. I decided to do a happy one for the sk8er boy bot because I kinda just want a happy silly little guy. I love him very much and I think I might get a cavity because hes so fucking sweet. Yeah ^^. Think of this as an apology for the future opposite pov bot, it's gonna be kind of more accurate to the song (it shouldn't be too angsty :)).

I know some of you don't go back to old bots so I'm gonna put Michaelis in here because I need to spread his propaganda.

Whenever I have a favorite character/bot I literally worship them and have a mini shrine for them in my brain. 😘😘

Also TYSM For 2400+ followers!! I've been growing so much these past few months and it's both overwhelming and just amazing. To avoid repeating myself this thank you is gonna be pretty short- but please don't think I'm any less grateful than I have been in the past. All of you make bot making worth it- like just being able to see people having fun with my bots and interacting with you guys in the reviews brings me so much happiness. Thank you everyone for checking me out and deciding to stay, it means a lot <33. Please take care of yourselves and be responsible on the horny site! ;).

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.
